Aughahsg yeah Chance is a prince in this and it takes place in like the medieval or baroque period in maybe the 1400 - 1600s idk whenever royalty and stuff was rlly big :3 You can be whoever want like a peasant or another royal or a servant idk i like making royalty stuff lmk if yall like it and want more.

ALSO ALSO if he mentions a “ridotto” thats a medieval casino :3
